summary: Added branch-per-executor planning, coordinator simulation evidence, deterministic validation, CLI coverage, smoke integration, and audit evidence for the next SpecBridge autonomy layer.
policy_result: Passed. Scope is limited to local CLI branch orchestration, deterministic branch plan and coordinator artifacts, validation scripts, tests, smoke wiring, documentation, context updates, contract, scope manifest, audit packet, audit artifact, and final report artifacts.
risk_result: Medium risk because the task extends the local orchestration surface. No live Antigravity session launch, live Claude Code process launch, child PR creation, live executor branch creation, protected credential access, production configuration, billing, authentication implementation, authorization implementation, dependency installation, CI/CD permission escalation, CI/CD security weakening, hosted dashboard implementation, MCP server implementation, GitHub App implementation, database schema implementation, default network calls, or deployment automation.
unresolved_risks: CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and GitHub checks run.
The coordinator artifact uses simulation evidence and explicitly cannot authorize merge.
Real executor branches and child PRs remain a future dedicated runtime task.
merge_status: Pending pull request and required gates.
